title: brain inspect — --json success output
description: Read-only vault overview. Enumerates parsed notes, per-type counts, and any structural issues (broken links, duplicate ids, frontmatter problems) as data — it never throws on a malformed vault, it reports it. Tier-0 read: an executed run appends exactly one terminal run.readonly git-ref audit event (best-effort, backup-coalesced). The vault summary stays available even when that audit path is down (broker unreachable, ledger unavailable, or backup watermark blocked) — the run then degrades to non-persisting and the summary still prints.

vault.description: Absolute path of the inspected vault.

projection.description: Summary of the projection store compared to the freshly parsed vault. `available` is false when no migrated projection store exists yet; `diverged` is true when a note is present/absent on one side or a content hash differs (i.e. `db rebuild` is needed).

ok.description: True when no `error`-severity issue was found.

projection.detail: projection diverged from vault: 1 vault note(s) missing from projection — run `db rebuild`

x-atlas-contract.summary: Read-only vault + projection overview: note inventory, projection divergence summary, and structural issues (audited Tier-0 read).
sideEffects: an executed run emits exactly one run.readonly git-ref audit event (Tier-0 read; backup-coalesced, best-effort)
prohibitedEffects: no more than one terminal run.readonly event per run
no backup forced per read (the watermark coalesces read-run coverage)

errorCodes.when: the configured vault path is missing or unreadable
